[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1101000 3
1 1100000 2
2 0101101 4
3 1010101 4
4 1011101 5
5 1110111 6
6 0101010 3
7 1110111 6

01 10 0101011 4
12 21 1111101 6
23 32 1011101 5 match 4
34 43 1111101 6
45 54 1101111 6
56 65 1111010 5
67 76 1111111 a
70 07 0111111 6

02 20 1111111 a
13 31 0111001 4
24 42 1110101 5
35 53 0011010 3
46 64 1110111 6 match 5 7
57 75 0111111 6
60 06 1111010 5
71 17 0111111 6

03 30 0111010 4
14 41 1101101 5
25 52 1011111 6
36 63 1111010 5
47 74 1111111 a
50 05 0101010 3 match 6
61 16 1111011 6
72 27 1111111 a

04 40 1101111 6
15 51 0101011 4

37 73 0111111 6
